question: Find Stellar builders based in Latin America who work on payments or DeFi.

golden.answer:
A grounded answer derives its named examples and status claims from the live Stellar Scout directory or research data, then dates the roster so it is not presented as permanent. As of 2026-07-11, the live builder directory returned 19 Latin America matches, including builders in Chile and Brazil.

The dated example is illustrative: a later grounded answer should report what the same source basis supports at its own observation time while preserving the stable distinctions above.
keyFacts: Presents specific source-supported content as a current or dated observation rather than as an unsupported memory claim.
Makes the as-of date visible for every changeable roster, status, version, or measurement.
Attributes names to Scout while using independent project footprints only as corroboration.
avoid: Do NOT treat the roster as permanent or infer mainnet/audit/seniority status from a directory row.
Do NOT replace live directory discovery with memory or web search; external sources may corroborate returned profiles.
Do NOT present the observed live result set as a complete or permanent roster; explicitly historical facts remain historical.
golden.notes:
GT-35 CORRECTION 2026-07-10: grade a dated, Scout-attributed roster with evidence boundaries. Live filters are q/location/skill; directory count and membership are volatile. Public footprints may corroborate results and Tippa/Stellar View are not corpus-only.
GT-35 independently confirmed by processes 3287/3289. Treat freshness as required despite the inherited static tag.
